intentSynonyms: get an user calendar in leetcode
look up an user calendar in leetcode
fetch a single user calendar in leetcode
view one specific user calendar in leetcode
get submission calendar and streaks in leetcode
description: Get a user submission calendar (heatmap data), current streak, total active days, and active years. Optionally filter by year.

year.description: Filter by year (e.g., 2025). Omit for all years.
